---
toc: false
format: 
  html: 
#    include-in-header: hero-image.html
    include-after-body: _footer.html
    sidebar: false
    title-block: false
    anchor-sections: false
    css: [theme.css, index.css]
listing:
# - id: noticias
#   contents: "noticias/2026/**/*.qmd"
#   sort: date desc
#   type: grid
#   grid-columns: 3
#   image-height: 300px
#   fields: [image, title, description]
#   max-items: 6
#   categories: false

- id: publications
  contents: "references/publications/posts/*.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: table
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 100px
  fields: [title, author, description, publication]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Title"
    author: "Authors"
    description: "Descripcion"
  max-items: 4
  categories: false

- id: presentations
  contents: "references/presentations/posts/*.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: table
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
  fields: [author,title]
  max-items: 4
  categories: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# To change the hero-image:

# open theme.css
# find the .hero-image section
```

```{r}
#| include: false
library(htmltools)
source("R/functions.R")
```


:::{.column-screen style="background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.82), rgba(120, 98, 98, 0.82)), url('images/multitud.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; background-repeat: no-repeat;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{.home-column-image .col-left}

<br>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<a href="https://jus-mer.github.io/web-proyecto/docs/">
![](images/logos/jusmer-cuad-blanco.png){width="150%"}
</a>
</div>


:::

:::{.home-column-text .col-right}

# Justicia de Mercado y Merecimiento del Bienestar Social 

:::

:::

<center> 

### JUSMER es un proyecto FONDECYT Regular (2025-2028) cuyo objetivo es estudiar las preferencias por justicia de mercado en Chile y su relación con distintos criterios de merecimiento. La justicia de mercado se refiere a una forma de distribución de bienes sociales (como salud, educación y pensiones) de acuerdo a la capacidad de pago. La principal hipótesis de este proyecto es que estas preferencias se asocian con el apoyo a algunos criterios de merecimiento (ej: el control del logro individual) por sobre otros (ej: las necesidades asociadas a factores estructurales). 
<br>

</center>

::: {.btn-container}
[Sobre el proyecto](software/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #9d3636; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::
:::


<!-- :::{.column-screen style="background-color:#9B2626;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#noticiash1}
:::


<center> <h1 class="heading-home" style="color: #fff;">Noticias</h1>
<span style = "color: #fff; font-style: italic">Últimas actualizaciones</span> 
</center>

::: {#noticias}
:::

::: {.btn-container}
[Noticias anteriores](noticias/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
::: -->

:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#fff;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#publicationsh1}
:::


# <span style="color: #8f2b2b;">Publicaciones</span>

::: {#publications}
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const rows = document.querySelectorAll("#listing-publications .quarto-listing-table tbody tr");

  rows.forEach((row) => {
    const authorNode = row.querySelector("td:nth-child(2) .listing-author");
    const descriptionCell = row.querySelector("td:nth-child(3)");
    const descriptionNode = descriptionCell && (descriptionCell.querySelector(".listing-description") || descriptionCell);
    const titleLink = row.querySelector("td:nth-child(1) a");
    const publicationNode = row.querySelector("td:nth-child(4)");
    const dateSort = row.getAttribute("data-listing-date-sort");

    if (titleLink && publicationNode) {
      let journal = publicationNode.textContent.trim();
      journal = journal
        .replace(/\s*\[https?:\/\/[^\]]+\]\(https?:\/\/[^\)]+\)\s*/g, "")
        .replace(/\s*https?:\/\/\S+\s*/g, "")
        .trim();

      journal = journal.split(",")[0].trim();

      if (journal && !/\s\u2014\s/.test(titleLink.textContent)) {
        titleLink.textContent = titleLink.textContent.trim() + " \u2014 " + journal;
      }
    }

    if (authorNode && dateSort) {
      const year = new Date(Number(dateSort)).getUTCFullYear();
      if (Number.isFinite(year) && !/\(\d{4}\)\s*$/.test(authorNode.textContent.trim())) {
        authorNode.textContent = authorNode.textContent.trim() + " (" + year + ")";
      }
    }

    if (!descriptionNode || !titleLink) return;
    if (descriptionCell.querySelector("a.pub-read-more")) return;

    const words = descriptionNode.textContent.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
    if (words.length > 50) {
      descriptionNode.textContent = words.slice(0, 80).join(" ") + "...";
    }

    const readMoreLink = document.createElement("a");
    readMoreLink.href = titleLink.getAttribute("href");
    readMoreLink.className = "pub-read-more";
    readMoreLink.textContent = "keep reading";

    descriptionCell.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
    descriptionCell.appendChild(readMoreLink);
  });
});
</script>

::: {.btn-container}
[Más publicaciones](noticias/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::



:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#9B2626;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#presentationsh1}
:::


# <span style="color: #fff;">Presentaciones</span>

<br>

::: {#presentations}
:::

::: {.btn-container}
[Más presentaciones](presentaciones/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::



:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#fff;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#equipoh1}
:::

# Equipo

```{r}
#| echo: false
tags$div(class = "row team-grid-4",

create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://jc-castillo.com/",
  img_src = "images/people/jc.png",
  name = "Juan Carlos Castillo",
  text = "Investigador Principal"
),
create_team_card(
  
  person_page = "https://andreas-lafferte.github.io/alaffert-website/",
  img_src = "images/people/andreas.jpg",
  name = "Andreas Laffert",
  text = "Asistente de investigación"
),
create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom%C3%A1s-urz%C3%BAa-moreno-b65755375/",
  img_src = "images/people/tomas.jpg",
  name = "Tomás Urzúa",
  text = "Tesista"
),
create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://renejcanales.github.io/renecanales-website/",
  img_src = "images/people/rene.jpg",
  name = "René Canales",
  text = "Asistente de investigación"
)
)
```

:::
:::
